summary: Plan-only remediation assessment for five open contributor PRs. No GitHub mutations are allowed by this job. Three non-security PRs lack complete merge preflight because mergeability is unknown and Codex /review proof is absent, so they need maintainer/review preflight before merge or repair can be recommended. The deterministic validator identified #91921 and #89577 as security-sensitive targets, so those exact PR refs are routed to central security handling instead of ProjectClownfish remediation.
